channel.title: SSscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Researchers Identify Mystery Object Found Two Miles Below the Ocean Surface
item.description: A deep-sea golden orb discovered in the Gulf of Alaska puzzled scientists for more than two years before researchers were finally able to determine its origin.

item.title: Scientists Image Particle Pairing Behavior Inside Superconductor-Like Systems
item.description: In a breakthrough experiment, researchers directly observed how particles form coordinated pairs within a superconductor analog, revealing behavior distinct from independent particle movement.

item.title: Undergraduate Students Construct Homemade Dark Matter Detector
item.description: A team of undergraduates designed and built their own dark matter detection device, using it to investigate one of physics' most enduring unsolved questions.

item.title: Newly Discovered Prehistoric Mammal Sheds Light on Post-Extinction Survival
item.description: The fossil of Cimolodon desosai, a small mammal species, may help explain how some life forms endured the mass extinction event that wiped out the dinosaurs.
